title: Implement deterministic recorder and visibility detection (P0)

environment.os: Windows local; GitHub Actions Ubuntu and Windows

commands.name: Missing deterministic-recorder module
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/deterministic-recorder.test.ts --project property tests/property/deterministic-recorder.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/deterministic-recorder.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: All three focused suites failed to import the not-yet-created deterministic-recorder module

commands.name: Canonical recorder contracts and seeded visibility properties
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/runner typecheck && pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/deterministic-recorder.test.ts --project property tests/property/deterministic-recorder.property.test.ts

commands.name: Real Chromium response-tail and service-worker edge cases
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/deterministic-recorder.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: All three real-browser cases failed: Chromium's post-response 204 loading tail was misclassified as visibility loss, the forced-gap assertion inherited that false reason, and the blocked service-worker API was unavailable rather than returning a controller

commands.name: Real CDP browser, network, storage, screenshot, gap, service-worker, and opaque-body cases
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/deterministic-recorder.test.ts

commands.name: Root lint rejected unsafe matcher assignments in recorder integration proof
commands.command: pnpm lint
commands.expectedFailure: ESLint reported four unsafe any assignments introduced by nested asymmetric test matchers

commands.name: Undefined deterministic-recorder browser stories
commands.command: PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@RUN-02 pnpm test:bdd
commands.expectedFailure: Both RUN-02 scenarios exposed twelve undefined recorder step instances before their isolated-browser bindings existed

commands.name: Independent baseline observation and known visibility-loss stories
commands.command: PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@RUN-02 pnpm test:bdd

commands.name: URL minimization, required-checkpoint, and optional-field regressions
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/deterministic-recorder.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/deterministic-recorder.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The config accepted no required checkpoint, URL values were not minimized, and a missing allowed-but-optional field incorrectly produced NOT_VISIBLE

commands.name: Minimized URLs and checkpoint-specific field/response visibility
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/runner typecheck && pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/deterministic-recorder.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/deterministic-recorder.test.ts

commands.name: Tampered observation facts retained a stale canonical hash
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/deterministic-recorder.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The report schema accepted changed observation facts while preserving the original payload hash

commands.name: Focused deterministic-recorder behavior matrix
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/deterministic-recorder.test.ts --project property tests/property/deterministic-recorder.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/deterministic-recorder.test.ts

commands.name: Latest runner build, root lint, and executable recorder stories
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/runner build && pnpm lint && PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@RUN-02 pnpm test:bdd

commands.name: Evidence traceability required the RUN-02 manifest
commands.command: pnpm evidence:check
commands.expectedFailure: The evidence checker reported the new unit, property, and integration recorder proof files as orphans

commands.name: Evidence inventory and traceability reconciliation
commands.command: pnpm evidence:check && pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/evidence-harness.test.ts

commands.name: Complete optimized-production repository verification
commands.command: pnpm verify

commands.name: Production dependency and credential-pattern audit
commands.command: pnpm audit --prod and workspace credential-pattern scan

commands.name: Clean-checkout request selection was sensitive to Chromium CORS preflights
commands.command: GitHub Actions run 29810053782 on source commit f9b728fd6177dca3bd97116f8c6f65b9ec88f360
commands.expectedFailure: Ubuntu and Windows each selected a host-matching OPTIONS preflight in one recorder assertion instead of the configured POST /collect request; the recorder visibility decision itself remained method-and-path specific

commands.name: Exact configured-request selection across repeated real-Chromium runs
commands.command: Run tests/integration/deterministic-recorder.test.ts six consecutive times after matching host, method, and path

commands.name: Exact-request BDD, lint, and type checks
commands.command: PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@RUN-02 pnpm test:bdd -- --production && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck

commands.name: Clean-checkout Ubuntu and Windows verification
commands.command: GitHub Actions run 29810698922 on source commit dedd0151d819dd99b1cd18609b8fb7713c0e1b60

commands.name: Source-bound optimized-production recorder workflows
commands.command: PACTWIRE_CAPTURE_CURATED_EVIDENCE=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_TASK=RUN-02 PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@RUN-02 pnpm test:bdd -- --production

commands.name: Browser-trace privacy sanitization
commands.command: Mechanically replace the repository root in Playwright trace.stacks, preserve every archive entry, and scan expanded traces plus curated evidence for personal paths and credential patterns

commands.name: Captured RUN-02 assets required manifest traceability
commands.command: pnpm evidence:check
commands.expectedFailure: The evidence checker reported the two recorder reports, two screenshots, and two sanitized paired browser traces as six orphan evidence assets before they were added to this manifest

commands.name: Completed evidence inventory and harness reconciliation
commands.command: pnpm evidence:check && pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/evidence-harness.test.ts

commands.name: Final complete optimized-production repository verification with curated evidence
commands.command: pnpm verify

scenarios.scenario: The independent recorder witnesses the required fictional submission request
A known required recorder gap cannot become a clean result

visualEvidence.rationale: RUN-02 changes browser observation and a visible capture-loss state. The optimized-production BDD workflows therefore retain recorder reports, desktop screenshots, and paired sanitized Playwright traces. No responsive product screen changed in this task, so a narrow-viewport duplicate is not applicable; the recorder boundary is proven at the controlled 1280 by 900 run viewport.

assets.altText: Machine-readable browser-CDP recorder report for a fictional classroom submission, with one deterministic action, ten canonical observations, authorized request-field hashes, response metadata, and a VISIBLE required checkpoint.
assets.caption: The independent recorder observed the exact POST /collect checkpoint, hashed only the authorized fictional fields, recorded the 204 response and storage changes, and classified all required P0 facts as VISIBLE.

assets.altText: Desktop capture of the controlled fictional classroom fixture after a baseline submission, showing BASELINE mode and a green Fictional submission completed receipt.
assets.caption: The baseline workflow completed through the declared controlled fixture while the independent recorder produced the paired VISIBLE report.

assets.altText: Sanitized fourteen-entry Playwright browser archive paired with the baseline recorder report, preserving actions, snapshots, screenshots, network records, and stack metadata.
assets.caption: All fourteen raw trace entries are preserved; the single local repository-root occurrence in optional stack metadata is replaced with $REPOSITORY.

assets.altText: Machine-readable browser-CDP recorder report for a controlled required-stream loss, with one deterministic action, eleven canonical observations, an INSTRUMENTATION_UNAVAILABLE gap, and a NOT_VISIBLE required checkpoint.
assets.caption: Even though the fictional submission occurred, the trusted forced capture gap dominates matching observations and prevents a clean or visible result.

assets.altText: Desktop capture of the controlled fictional classroom fixture in INVISIBLE mode, showing a required-capture warning and a submission-completed-with-declared-capture-gap receipt.
assets.caption: The visible fixture warning and completion receipt are paired with the independent recorder's NOT_VISIBLE classification; page content cannot clear the trusted gap.

assets.altText: Sanitized eleven-entry Playwright browser archive paired with the visibility-loss recorder report, preserving actions, snapshots, screenshots, network records, and stack metadata.
assets.caption: All eleven raw trace entries are preserved; the single local repository-root occurrence in optional stack metadata is replaced with $REPOSITORY.

proofs.description: Versioned browser-CDP recorder, canonical observations and hashes, minimized request-field summaries, response metadata, storage diffs, masked screenshots, capture gaps, and required visibility evaluation
Strict P0 configuration, URL minimization, canonical ordering, authorized-field hashing, report integrity, and visibility examples
Seeded PROP-22 ordering/hash determinism and PROP-05 required-gap classification invariants
Real isolated Chromium CDP, request/response, storage, screenshot, service-worker, opaque-body, optional-field, and forced-gap coverage
Independent required-request observation workflow tagged RUN-02, FR-031, and FR-035
Known required capture-gap workflow tagged RUN-02, FR-031, FR-035, and PROP-05
Real isolated Chromium, independent fixture oracle, recorder finalization, Playwright trace, screenshot, JSON report, and capture-gap evidence bindings
Source-bound canonical recorder report proving the exact required request, authorized field hashes, response metadata, storage changes, and VISIBLE baseline classification
Source-bound optimized-production screenshot of the completed controlled baseline workflow
Sanitized paired Playwright archive preserving all fourteen baseline trace entries
Source-bound canonical recorder report proving a trusted required-stream gap deterministically yields NOT_VISIBLE
Source-bound optimized-production screenshot of the declared capture-gap workflow and visible loss warning
Sanitized paired Playwright archive preserving all eleven visibility-loss trace entries

knownLimitations: RUN-02 P0 records browser-visible facts through an independent CDP session; it does not claim visibility into traffic outside the isolated browser or plaintext semantics that the browser itself cannot inspect.
FR-038 proxy capture is the explicit P1 follow-on. The P0 schema accepts only BROWSER_CDP and cannot mislabel a browser report as proxy evidence.
RUN-03 still owns the GPT-5.6 computer-use lane; model output cannot create or replace any RUN-02 observation or visibility decision.
Authorized request values and all storage values persist only as SHA-256 digests; raw request bodies, headers, cookies, query values, fragments, and configured secrets are absent from recorder JSON.
All exercised identities, values, hosts, and capture gaps are controlled fictional fixtures; a visible run is not a safety, compliance, agreement-conformity, or product-effectiveness conclusion.
